hero.lede:
At Polished Skin, we believe healthy skin ages better.

Located in Eugene, Oregon, we specialize in age management, corrective skincare, rosacea care, hyperpigmentation correction, and skin barrier restoration through personalized treatment plans designed around your skin â not a one-size-fits-all protocol.

Whether you're concerned about fine lines, wrinkles, skin laxity, redness, pigmentation, acne, dehydration, or sensitive skin, every treatment is customized to help your skin function at its best.

Using advanced treatments including Glo2FacialÂź, BioRePeelÂź, ProCell MicrochannelingÂź, Jet PlasmaÂź, and corrective facials, we focus on improving skin health, supporting collagen production, strengthening the skin barrier, and creating results that continue to improve over time.

Many clients come to us looking for a facial. What they discover is a personalized approach that helps them achieve healthier, stronger, more radiant skin with confidence.

Healthy skin isn't created through aggressive treatments. It's created by supporting your skin's natural ability to repair, renew, and thrive.

That's the Polished Skin difference.

science.heading: Personalized treatments. Healthier skin.
science.body:
You don't need to know which treatment to book â that's our job.

At Polished Skin in Eugene, Oregon, every appointment begins with a personalized skin consultation. We evaluate your skin, discuss your concerns, and create a customized treatment plan designed specifically for your goals.

Whether you're concerned about fine lines, wrinkles, skin laxity, rosacea, redness, hyperpigmentation, acne, dehydration, enlarged pores, or sensitive skin, we'll help you find the right solution for healthier, more radiant skin.

Using advanced treatments including **Glo2FacialÂź, BioRePeelÂź, Jet PlasmaÂź, ProCell MicrochannelingÂź, and corrective facials**, we help improve skin health, strengthen the skin barrier, stimulate collagen production, and support healthy aging.

Clients often notice brighter skin, improved hydration, smoother texture, reduced redness, improved firmness, and a healthier overall complexion.

As a trusted Eugene esthetician specializing in **age management, corrective skincare, rosacea treatment, hyperpigmentation correction, and skin rejuvenation**, our goal is simple: help your skin look better by helping it function better.

**Healthy skin ages better.** That's why we focus on rebuilding skin â not breaking it down.

results.heading: Real results. Healthier skin.
results.body:
Beautiful skin starts with healthy skin.

At Polished Skin, we help clients throughout Eugene, Oregon improve skin texture, firmness, hydration, tone, redness, and overall skin health through personalized treatment plans designed around their unique concerns and goals.

Whether you're looking for age management treatments, rosacea care, hyperpigmentation correction, acne support, skin barrier repair, or advanced corrective skincare, every treatment is customized to help your skin become healthier, stronger, and more resilient over time.

Using advanced treatments including **Glo2FacialÂź, BioRePeelÂź, Jet PlasmaÂź, and ProCell MicrochannelingÂź**, we focus on improving skin function â not just creating temporary changes. The results speak for themselves.

**Drag the slider to compare real client before-and-after results.**

What makes these transformations possible isn't a quick fix or a single treatment. It's a personalized approach, professional guidance, and a treatment plan designed specifically for your skin.

As a trusted Eugene esthetician specializing in age management and corrective skincare, our goal is simple: help your skin look better by helping it function better.

**Healthy skin ages better.** That's the foundation of everything we do.

about.heading: Healthy skin starts here. Personalized care.
about.body:
At Polished Skin, we believe healthy skin ages better.

Founded by licensed esthetician **Analisa Hickey**, Polished Skin is a results-driven skincare studio in **Eugene, Oregon** specializing in **age management, corrective skincare, rosacea treatment, hyperpigmentation correction, acne support, and skin barrier restoration**.

Every treatment begins with understanding your skin, your concerns, and your goals. Whether you're looking to improve fine lines, wrinkles, redness, pigmentation, dehydration, acne, or overall skin health, your treatment plan is customized specifically for you.

Using advanced treatments including **Glo2FacialÂź, BioRePeelÂź, Jet PlasmaÂź, ProCell MicrochannelingÂź, and customized corrective facials**, we help improve skin function, stimulate collagen production, strengthen the skin barrier, and create visible results that continue to improve over time.

Unlike one-size-fits-all skincare, our approach combines professional expertise, advanced technology, and personalized care to help you achieve healthier, stronger, more radiant skin with confidence.

As a trusted Eugene esthetician, our mission is simple: **help your skin look better by helping it function better.**

**Healthy skin isn't created by quick fixes.** It's created through consistency, customization, and treatments that work with your skin, not against it.

cards.title: Personalized Treatment Plans
cards.text: Your skin is unique, and your treatment plan should be too. Every appointment is customized to your concerns, goals, lifestyle, and skin condition â whether you're focused on healthy aging, rosacea, pigmentation, acne, or restoring a compromised skin barrier.

cards.title: Advanced Corrective Skincare
cards.text: As a licensed esthetician and ProCell-certified specialist in Eugene, Oregon, Analisa combines advanced treatments including Glo2FacialÂź, BioRePeelÂź, Jet PlasmaÂź, and ProCell MicrochannelingÂź to create customized solutions that support healthier, stronger, more resilient skin.

cards.title: Results That Continue to Improve
cards.text: We focus on improving skin function, not just creating a temporary glow. By supporting collagen production, strengthening the skin barrier, improving hydration, and reducing inflammation, results continue to develop long after your appointment.

cards.title: Honest Recommendations
cards.text: No pressure. No unnecessary upsells. No one-size-fits-all treatment plans. You'll always understand why a treatment or home-care recommendation is being made and how it supports your goals.

cards.title: Healthy Skin Ages Better
cards.text: Our philosophy is simple: healthy skin is beautiful skin. Every treatment is designed to support your skin's natural ability to repair, renew, and thrive while creating visible improvements in tone, texture, firmness, and overall skin health.

cards.title: Trusted in Eugene
cards.text: With a 4.9-star Google rating and clients throughout Eugene and the surrounding area, Polished Skin has become a trusted destination for age management, corrective skincare, rosacea treatment, hyperpigmentation correction, skin barrier repair, and skin rejuvenation.
